summary: Coach Profile Self-Service V1 - Complete Testing. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Profile page features verified. Profile form, contact method pills, save functionality, completeness badges, and avatar dropdown all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/profile correctly returns current user's profile with completeness calculation
PUT /api/profile validates: empty name (400), invalid contact_method (400), bio >500 chars (400)
Valid contact methods: email, phone, text, slack - all working correctly
Profile completeness logic: incomplete (name only), basic (name + 2 fields), complete (name + contact + availability + bio)
GET /api/profile/{coach_id} restricted to directors (403 for coaches)
GET /api/roster includes coach_contact_method, coach_availability, coach_bio per group
Profile page has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Avatar dropdown in header correctly shows Profile link
Contact method pills toggle correctly with visual selection state
Save button disabled when no changes, enabled when changes made
Bio shows character count (/500) and enforces max length
Team field is read-only (managed by director)
Completeness badge updates correctly after save
seed_data_creation: Coach Williams has seeded profile data (contact_method=text, phone=555-123-4567, availability='Weekday mornings, Tues/Thurs evenings', bio='10 years coaching...'). Coach Garcia's profile was modified during testing to verify completeness logic.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Self-Service V1 fully verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/profile (own profile with completeness), PUT /api/profile (update name/phone/contact_method/availability/bio), GET /api/profile/{coach_id} (director-only view). Profile page data-testid: profile-page, profile-form, profile-name-input, profile-contact-{email/phone/text/slack}, profile-phone-input, profile-availability-input, profile-bio-input, profile-save-btn, profile-completeness-badge. Header dropdown: user-menu-trigger, menu-profile-link, menu-logout-link. Activation panel: coach-activation-panel, activation-panel-toggle, profile-badge-{coach_id}. Roster groups include coach_contact_method, coach_availability, coach_bio. Login page: input-email, input-password, auth-submit-btn.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/profile - returns profile with all fields ✓
PUT /api/profile - can update multiple fields at once ✓
Completeness: 'complete' when name + contact + availability + bio ✓
GET /api/profile/{coach_id} - director can view any coach ✓
frontend_components: Login page loads with correct testid attributes ✓
Avatar dropdown shows Sign out link (menu-logout-link) ✓
Contact method pills exist: email, phone, text, slack ✓
Contact method pills toggle selection correctly ✓
Save button (profile-save-btn) disabled when no changes ✓
Save button enables when field changed ✓
Save updates profile and shows toast ✓
Director can access own profile page ✓
Coach Activation panel shows profile completeness column ✓
Roster groups show coach contact info (Prefers email, availability) ✓
